reviews.review_title: Fun if u like seeing places. Needs audio
reviews.review_description:
This is a fun little app at a cheap price. It's like a more fun way to see 360 photos of cool places.
It pulls in photo spheres from Google maps and hides clues in the pics. So far very easy but only did a few levels and there are many more.  
I'd like some audio ideally to bring the scenes to life, eg people chatting, city or water noises if applicable. Then would rate 5 stars. Thanks

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! The latest update included a lot of audio and sound effects!

reviews.review_description: Poor images from Google street but the world map infography is ok

I got this game because I thought a good geoguessing game would be fun in VR, but this only has 8 really obvious levels and the hint pins system is confusing. This feels more like an educational game for kids in elementary school, but still kind of confusing UI.
Works great, looks great but was a bit too short.
The 360 experience is perfect! Really good for geography freaks
